# Load all packages

```{r}
library(dbplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
```

# Load the data

```{r}
data_DIR = "~/Documents/PhD/3_experiment/relative_pratt/Results"
plot_DIR = "~/Documents/PhD/3_experiment/relative_pratt/pots"
data <- read.csv(file.path(data_DIR, "participants_data_with_acoustics.csv"), row.names = 1)
```

# Base model
We want to confirm the Pratt's effect by predicting the elveation difference with f0.

```{r}
model_freq <- lmer(elevation_diff ~ frequency + (1|subject), data = data)
summary(model_freq)
```
